};\\n136: \\n137: class ListenerImpl;\\n138: using ListenerImplPtr = std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>;\\n139: \\n140: /**\\n141:  * All listener manager stats. @see stats_macros.h\\n142:  */\\n143: #define ALL_LISTENER_MANAGER_STATS(COUNTER, GAUGE)                                                 \\\\\\n144:   COUNTER(listener_added)                                                                          \\\\\\n145:   COUNTER(listener_create_failure)                                                                 \\\\\\n146:   COUNTER(listener_create_success)                                                                 \\\\\\n147:   COUNTER(listener_in_place_updated)                                                               \\\\\\n148:   COUNTER(listener_modified)                                                                       \\\\\\n149:   COUNTER(listener_removed)                                                                        \\\\\\n150:   COUNTER(listener_stopped)                                                                        \\\\\\n151:   GAUGE(total_filter_chains_draining, NeverImport)                                                 \\\\\\n152:   GAUGE(total_listeners_active, NeverImport)                                                       \\\\\\n153:   GAUGE(total_listeners_draining, NeverImport)                                                     \\\\\\n154:   GAUGE(total_listeners_warming, NeverImport)                                                      \\\\\\n155:   GAUGE(workers_started, NeverImport)\\n156: \\n157: /**\\n158:  * Struct definition for all listener manager stats. @see stats_macros.h\\n159:  */\\n160: struct ListenerManagerStats {\\n161:   ALL_LISTENER_MANAGER_STATS(GENERATE_COUNTER_STRUCT, GENERATE_GAUGE_STRUCT)\\n162: };\\n163: \\n164: /**\\n165:  * Provides the draining filter chains and the functionality to schedule listener destroy.\\n166:  */\\n167: class DrainingFilterChainsManager {\\n168: public:\\n169:   DrainingFilterChainsManager(ListenerImplPtr&& draining_listener,\\n170:                               uint64_t workers_pending_removal);\\n171:   uint64_t getDrainingListenerTag() const { return draining_listener_->listenerTag(); }\\n172:   const std::list<const Network::FilterChain*>& getDrainingFilterChains() const {\\n173:     return draining_filter_chains_;\\n174:   }\\n175:   ListenerImpl& getDrainingListener() const { return *draining_listener_; }\\n176:   uint64_t decWorkersPendingRemoval() { return --workers_pending_removal_; }\\n177: \\n178:   // Schedule listener destroy.\\n179:   void startDrainSequence(std::chrono::seconds drain_time, Event::Dispatcher& dispatcher,\\n180:                           std::function<void()> completion) {\\n181:     drain_sequence_completion_ = completion;\\n182:     ASSERT(!drain_timer_);\\n183: \\n184:     drain_timer_ = dispatcher.createTimer([this]() -> void { drain_sequence_completion_(); });\\n185:     drain_timer_->enableTimer(drain_time);\\n186:   }\\n187: \\n188:   void addFilterChainToDrain(const Network::FilterChain& filter_chain) {\\n189:     draining_filter_chains_.push_back(&filter_chain);\\n190:   }\\n191: \\n192:   uint32_t numDrainingFilterChains() const { return draining_filter_chains_.size(); }\\n193: \\n194: private:\\n195:   ListenerImplPtr draining_listener_;\\n196:   std::list<const Network::FilterChain*> draining_filter_chains_;\\n197: \\n198:   uint64_t workers_pending_removal_;\\n199:   Event::TimerPtr drain_timer_;\\n200:   std::function<void()> drain_sequence_completion_;\\n201: };\\n202: \\n203: /**\\n204:  * Implementation of ListenerManager.\\n205:  */\\n206: class ListenerManagerImpl : public ListenerManager, Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\\n207: public:\\n208:   ListenerManagerImpl(Instance& server, std::unique_ptr<ListenerComponentFactory>&& factory,\\n209:                       WorkerFactory& worker_factory, bool enable_dispatcher_stats,\\n210:                       Quic::QuicStatNames& quic_stat_names);\\n211: \\n212:   void onListenerWarmed(ListenerImpl& listener);\\n213:   void inPlaceFilterChainUpdate(ListenerImpl& listener);\\n214: \\n215:   // Server::ListenerManager\\n216:   absl::StatusOr<bool> addOrUpdateListener(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n217:                                            const std::string& version_info,\\n218:                                            bool added_via_api) override;\\n219:   void createLdsApi(const envoy::config::core::v3::ConfigSource& lds_config,\\n220:                     const xds::core::v3::ResourceLocator* lds_resources_locator) override {\\n221:     ASSERT(lds_api_ == nullptr);\\n222:     lds_api_ = factory_->createLdsApi(lds_config, lds_resources_locator);\\n223:   }\\n224:   std::vector<std::reference_wrapper<Network::ListenerConfig>>\\n225:   listeners(ListenerState state = ListenerState::ACTIVE) override;\\n226:   uint64_t numConnections() const override;\\n227:   bool removeListener(const std::string& listener_name) override;\\n228:   absl::Status startWorkers(OptRef<GuardDog> guard_dog, std::function<void()> callback) override;\\n229:   void stopListeners(StopListenersType stop_listeners_type,\\n230:                      const Network::ExtraShutdownListenerOptions& options) override;\\n231:   void stopWorkers() override;\\n232:   void beginListenerUpdate() override { error_state_tracker_.clear(); }\\n233:   void endListenerUpdate(FailureStates&& failure_state) override;\\n234:   bool isWorkerStarted() override { return workers_started_; }\\n235:   Http::Context& httpContext() { return server_.httpContext(); }\\n236:   ApiListenerOptRef apiListener() override;\\n237: \\n238:   Quic::QuicStatNames& quicStatNames() { return quic_stat_names_; }\\n239: \\n240:   Instance& server_;\\n241:   std::unique_ptr<ListenerComponentFactory> factory_;\\n242: \\n243: private:\\n244:   using ListenerList = std::list<ListenerImplPtr>;\\n245:   /**\\n246:    * Callback invoked when a listener initialization is completed on worker.\\n247:    */\\n248:   using ListenerCompletionCallback = std::function<void()>;\\n249: \\n250:   absl::StatusOr<bool>\\n251:   addOrUpdateListenerInternal(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n252:                               const std::string& version_info, bool added_via_api,\\n253:                               const std::string& name);\\n254:   bool removeListenerInternal(const std::string& listener_name, bool dynamic_listeners_only);\\n255: \\n256:   struct DrainingListener {\\n257:     DrainingListener(ListenerImplPtr&& listener, uint64_t workers_pending_removal)\\n258:         : listener_(std::move(listener)), workers_pending_removal_(workers_pending_removal) {}\\n259: \\n260:     ListenerImplPtr listener_;\\n261:     uint64_t workers_pending_removal_;\\n262:   };\\n263: \\n264:   bool doFinalPreWorkerListenerInit(ListenerImpl& listener);\\n265:   void addListenerToWorker(Worker& worker, absl::optional<uint64_t> overridden_listener,\\n266:                            ListenerImpl& listener, ListenerCompletionCallback completion_callback);\\n267: \\n268:   ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr dumpListenerConfigs(const Matchers::StringMatcher& name_matcher);\\n269:   static ListenerManagerStats generateStats(Stats::Scope& scope);\\n270:   static bool hasListenerWithDuplicatedAddress(const ListenerList& list,\\n271:                                                const ListenerImpl& listener);\\n272:   void updateWarmingActiveGauges() {\\n273:     // Using set() avoids a multiple modifiers problem during the multiple processes phase of hot\\n274:     // restart.\\n275:     stats_.total_listeners_warming_.set(warming_listeners_.size());\\n276:     stats_.total_listeners_active_.set(active_listeners_.size());\\n277:   }\\n278:   bool listenersStopped(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\\n279:     // Currently all listeners in a given direction are stopped because of the way admin\\n280:     // drain_listener functionality is implemented. This needs to be revisited, if that changes - if\\n281:     // we support drain by listener name,for example.\\n282:     return stop_listeners_type_ == StopListenersType::All ||\\n283:            (stop_listeners_type_ == StopListenersType::InboundOnly &&\\n284:             config.traffic_direction() == envoy::config::core::v3::INBOUND);\\n285:   }\\n286:   void incListenerCreateFailureStat() {\\n287:     // TODO(mattklein123): Now that we no longer create sockets and apply options on workers,\\n288:     // this stat is confusingly named and should be more specific, however it's unclear if it's\\n289:     // worth changing.\\n290:     stats_.listener_create_failure_.inc();\\n291:   }\\n292: \\n293:   /**\\n294:    * Mark a listener for draining. The listener will no longer be considered active but will remain\\n295:    * present to allow connection draining.\\n296:    * @param listener supplies the listener to drain.\\n297:    */\\n298:   void drainListener(ListenerImplPtr&& listener);\\n299: \\n300:   /**\\n301:    * Start to draining filter chains that are owned by draining listener but not owned by\\n302:    * new_listener. The new listener should have taken over the listener socket and partial of the\\n303:    * filter chains from listener. This method is used by in place filter chain update.\\n304:    * @param draining_listener supplies the listener to be replaced.\\n305:    * @param new_listener supplies the new listener config which is going to replace the draining\\n306:    * listener.\\n307:    */\\n308:   void drainFilterChains(ListenerImplPtr&& draining_listener, ListenerImpl& new_listener);\\n309: \\n310:   /**\\n311:    * Stop a listener. The listener will stop accepting new connections and its socket will be\\n312:    * closed.\\n313:    * @param listener supplies the listener to stop.\\n314:    * @param options additional options to be passed through to shutdownListener.\\n315:    * @param completion supplies the completion to be called when all workers are stopped accepting\\n316:    * new connections. This completion is called on the main thread.\\n317:    */\\n318:   void stopListener(Network::ListenerConfig& listener,\\n319:                     const Network::ExtraShutdownListenerOptions& options,\\n320:                     std::function<void()> completion);\\n321: \\n322:   /**\\n323:    * Get a listener by name. This routine is used because listeners have inherent order in static\\n324:    * configuration and especially for tests. Thus, we can't use a map.\\n325:    * @param listeners supplies the listener list to look in.\\n326:    * @param name supplies the name to search for.\\n327:    */\\n328:   ListenerList::iterator getListenerByName(ListenerList& listeners, const std::string& name);\\n329: \\n330:   absl::Status setNewOrDrainingSocketFactory(const std::string& name, ListenerImpl& listener);\\n331:   absl::Status createListenSocketFactory(ListenerImpl& listener);\\n332: \\n333:   void maybeCloseSocketsForListener(ListenerImpl& listener);\\n334:   absl::Status setupSocketFactoryForListener(ListenerImpl& new_listener,\\n335:                                              const ListenerImpl& existing_listener);\\n336: \\n337:   ApiListenerPtr api_listener_;\\n338:   // Active listeners are listeners that are currently accepting new connections on the workers.\\n339:   ListenerList active_listeners_;\\n340:   // Warming listeners are listeners that may need further initialization via the listener's init\\n341:   // manager. For example, RDS, or in the future KDS. Once a listener is done warming it will\\n342:   // be transitioned to active.\\n343:   ListenerList warming_listeners_;\\n344:   // Draining listeners are listeners that are in the process of being drained and removed. They\\n345:   // go through two phases where first the workers stop accepting new connections and existing\\n346:   // connections are drained. Then after that time period the listener is removed from all workers\\n347:   // and any remaining connections are closed.\\n348:   std::list<DrainingListener> draining_listeners_;\\n349:   std::list<DrainingFilterChainsManager> draining_filter_chains_manager_;\\n350: \\n351:   std::vector<WorkerPtr> workers_;\\n352:   bool workers_started_{};\\n353:   absl::optional<StopListenersType> stop_listeners_type_;\\n354:   Stats::ScopeSharedPtr scope_;\\n355:   ListenerManagerStats stats_;\\n356:   ConfigTracker::EntryOwnerPtr config_tracker_entry_;\\n357:   LdsApiPtr lds_api_;\\n358:   const bool enable_dispatcher_stats_{};\\n359:   using UpdateFailureState = envoy::admin::v3::UpdateFailureState;\\n360:   absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, std::unique_ptr<UpdateFailureState>> error_state_tracker_;\\n361:   FailureStates overall_error_state_;\\n362:   Quic::QuicStatNames& quic_stat_names_;\\n363: };\\n364: \\n365: class ListenerFilterChainFactoryBuilder : public FilterChainFactoryBuilder {\\n366: public:\\n367:   ListenerFilterChainFactoryBuilder(\\n368:       ListenerImpl& listener, Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContextImpl& factory_context);\\n369: \\n370:   absl::StatusOr<Network::DrainableFilterChainSharedPtr>\\n371:   buildFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::FilterChain& filter_chain,\\n372:                    FilterChainFactoryContextCreator& context_creator) const override;\\n373: \\n374: private:\\n375:   absl::StatusOr<Network::DrainableFilterChainSharedPtr> buildFilterChainInternal(\\n376:       const envoy::config::listener::v3::FilterChain& filter_chain,\\n377:       Configuration::FilterChainFactoryContextPtr&& filter_chain_factory_context) const;\\n378: \\n379:   ListenerImpl& listener_;\\n380:   ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validator_;\\n381:   ListenerComponentFactory& listener_component_factory_;\\n382:   Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContextImpl& factory_context_;\\n383: };\\n384: \\n385: class DefaultListenerManagerFactoryImpl : public ListenerManagerFactory {\\n386: public:\\n387:   std::unique_ptr<ListenerManager>\\n388:   createListenerManager(Instance& server, std::unique_ptr<ListenerComponentFactory>&& factory,\\n389:                         WorkerFactory& worker_factory, bool enable_dispatcher_stats,\\n390:                         Quic::QuicStatNames& quic_stat_names) override {\\n391:     return std::make_unique<ListenerManagerImpl>(server, std::move(factory), worker_factory,\\n392:                                                  enable_dispatcher_stats, quic_stat_names);\\n393:   }\\n394:   std::string name() const override {\\n395:     return Config::ServerExtensionValues::get().DEFAULT_LISTENER;\\n396:   }\\n397:   ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr createEmptyConfigProto() override {\\n398:     return std::make_unique<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerManager>();\\n399:   }\\n400: };\\n401: \\n402: DECLARE_FACTORY(DefaultListenerManagerFactoryImpl);\\n403: \\n404: } // namespace Server\\n405: } // namespace Envoy\\n406: public:\\n66:   static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>>\\n67:   create(ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\\n68: ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\\n71:          const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets);\\n72: \\n73:   // Network::ListenSocketFactory\\n74: local_address_;\\n77:   }\\n78:   Network::SocketSharedPtr getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) override;\\n79:   Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr clone() const override {\\n80:     return absl::WrapUnique(new ListenSocketFactoryImpl(*this));\\n81:   }\\n82:   void closeAllSockets() override {\\n83:     for (auto& socket : sockets_) {\\n84:       socket->close();\\n85:     }\\n86: Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\\n92:                           Network::Socket::Type socket_type,\\n93:                           const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\\n94:                           const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\\n95:                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\\n96: ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone);\\n100: \\n101:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr>\\n102:   createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\\n103:                                     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index);\\n104: \\n105:   ListenerComponentFactory& factory_;\\n106:   // Initially, its port number might be 0. Once a socket is created, its port\\n107:   // will be set to the binding port.\\n108:   Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address_;\\n109:   const Network::Socket::Type socket_type_;\\n110:   const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr options_;\\n111:   const std::string listener_name_;\\n112:   const uint32_t tcp_backlog_size_;\\n113:   ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type_;\\n114:   const Network::SocketCreationOptions socket_creation_options_;\\n115:   // One socket for each worker, pre-created before the workers fetch the sockets. There are\\n116:   // 3 different cases:\\n117:   // 1) All are null when doing config validation.\\n118:   // 2) A single socket has been duplicated for each worker (no reuse_port).\\n119:   // 3) A unique socket for each worker (reuse_port).\\n120:   //\\n121:   // TODO(mattklein123): If a listener does not bind, it still has a socket. This is confusing\\n122:   // and not needed and can be cleaned up.\\n123:   std::vector<Network::SocketSharedPtr> sockets_;\\n124: };\\n125: \\n126: // TODO(mattklein123): Consider getting rid of pre-worker start and post-worker start code by\\n127: //                     initializing all listeners after workers are started.\\n128: \\n129: class ListenerImpl;\\n130: \\n131: /**\\n132:  * The common functionality shared by PerListenerFilterFactoryContexts and\\n133:  * PerFilterChainFactoryFactoryContexts.\\n134:  */\\n135: class ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl final : public Server::FactoryContextImplBase,\\n136:                                              public Network::DrainDecision {\\n137: public:\\n138:   ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\\n139:                                  ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\\n140:                                  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n141:                                  Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\\n142: \\n143:   Init::Manager& initManager() override;\\n144:   Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\\n145: \\n146:   // DrainDecision\\n147:   bool drainClose() const override {\\n148:     return drain_manager_->drainClose() || server_.drainManager().drainClose();\\n149:   }\\n150:   Server::DrainManager& drainManager();\\n151:   friend class ListenerImpl;\\n152: \\n153: private:\\n154:   const Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager_;\\n155: };\\n156: \\n157: // TODO(lambdai): Strip the interface since ListenerFactoryContext only need to support\\n158: // ListenerFilterChain creation. e.g, Is listenerMetaData() required? Is it required only at\\n159: // listener update or during the lifetime of listener?\\n160: class PerListenerFactoryContextImpl : public Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext {\\n161: public:\\n162:   PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\\n163:                                 ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\\n164:                                 const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config_message,\\n165:                                 ListenerImpl& listener_impl, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\\n166: \\n167:   PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(\\n168:       std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base,\\n169:       ListenerImpl& listener_impl)\\n170:       : listener_factory_context_base_(listener_factory_context_base),\\n171:         listener_impl_(listener_impl) {}\\n172: \\n173:   // FactoryContext\\n174:   Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\\n175:   Init::Manager& initManager() override;\\n176:   Stats::Scope& scope() override;\\n177:   const Network::ListenerInfo& listenerInfo() const override;\\n178:   ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& messageValidationVisitor() const override;\\n179:   Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& serverFactoryContext() const override;\\n180:   Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContext& getTransportSocketFactoryContext() const override;\\n181: \\n182:   Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override;\\n183: \\n184:   ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl& parentFactoryContext() { return *listener_factory_context_base_; }\\n185:   friend class ListenerImpl;\\n186: \\n187: private:\\n188:   std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base_;\\n189:   ListenerImpl& listener_impl_;\\n190: };\\n191: \\n192: /**\\n193:  * Maps proto config to runtime config for a listener with a network filter chain.\\n194:  */\\n195: class ListenerImpl final : public Network::ListenerConfig,\\n196:                            public Network::FilterChainFactory,\\n197:                            Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\\n198: public:\\n199:   /**\\n200:    * Create a new listener.\\n201:    * @param config supplies the configuration proto.\\n202:    * @param version_info supplies the xDS version of the listener.\\n203:    * @param parent supplies the owning manager.\\n204:    * @param name supplies the listener name.\\n205:    * @param added_via_api supplies whether the listener can be updated or removed.\\n206:    * @param workers_started supplies whether the listener is being added before or after workers\\n207:    *        have been started. This controls various behavior related to init management.\\n208:    * @param hash supplies the hash to use for duplicate checking.\\n209:    * @param concurrency is the number of listeners instances to be created.\\n210:    */\\n211:   static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\\n212:   create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\\n213:          ListenerManagerImpl& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\\n214:          bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\\n215:   ~ListenerImpl() override;\\n216: \\n217:   // TODO(lambdai): Explore using the same ListenerImpl object to execute in place filter chain\\n218:   // update.\\n219:   /**\\n220:    * Execute in place filter chain update. The filter chain update is less expensive than full\\n221:    * listener update because connections may not need to be drained.\\n222:    */\\n223:   absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\\n224:   newListenerWithFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n225:                              bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\\n226:   /**\\n227:    * Determine if in place filter chain update could be executed at this moment.\\n228:    */\\n229:   bool supportUpdateFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& new_config,\\n230:                                 bool worker_started);\\n231: \\n232:   /**\\n233:    * Run the callback on each filter chain that exists in this listener but not in the passed\\n234:    * listener config.\\n235:    */\\n236:   void diffFilterChain(const ListenerImpl& another_listener,\\n237:                        std::function<void(Network::DrainableFilterChain&)> callback);\\n238: \\n239:   /**\\n240:    * Helper functions to determine whether a listener is blocked for update or remove.\\n241:    */\\n242:   bool blockUpdate(uint64_t new_hash) { return new_hash == hash_ || !added_via_api_; }\\n243:   bool blockRemove() { return !added_via_api_; }\\n244: \\n245:   const std::vector<Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr>& addresses() const {\\n246:     return addresses_;\\n247:   }\\n248:   const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config() const { return config_; }\\n249:   const std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& getSocketFactories() const {\\n250:     return socket_factories_;\\n251:   }\\n252:   void debugLog(const std::string& message);\\n253:   void initialize();\\n254:   DrainManager& localDrainManager() const {\\n255:     return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->drainManager();\\n256:   }\\n257:   absl::Status addSocketFactory(Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr&& socket_factory);\\n258:   void setSocketAndOptions(const Network::SocketSharedPtr& socket);\\n259:   const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& listenSocketOptions(uint32_t address_index) {\\n260:     ASSERT(listen_socket_options_list_.size() > address_index);\\n261:     return listen_socket_options_list_[address_index];\\n262:   }\\n263:   const std::string& versionInfo() const { return version_info_; }\\n264:   bool reusePort() const { return reuse_port_; }\\n265:   static bool getReusePortOrDefault(Server::Instance& server,\\n266:                                     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n267:                                     Network::Socket::Type socket_type);\\n268: \\n269:   // Compare whether two listeners have different socket options.\\n270:   bool socketOptionsEqual(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\\n271:   // Check whether a new listener can share sockets with this listener.\\n272:   bool hasCompatibleAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\\n273:   // Check whether a new listener has duplicated listening address this listener.\\n274:   bool hasDuplicatedAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\\n275: \\n276:   // Network::ListenerConfig\\n277:   Network::FilterChainManager& filterChainManager() override { return *filter_chain_manager_; }\\n278:   Network::FilterChainFactory& filterChainFactory() override { return *this; }\\n279:   std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& listenSocketFactories() override {\\n280:     return socket_factories_;\\n281:   }\\n282:   bool bindToPort() const override { return bind_to_port_; }\\n283:   bool mptcpEnabled() { return mptcp_enabled_; }\\n284:   bool handOffRestoredDestinationConnections() const override {\\n285:     return hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\\n286:   }\\n287:   uint32_t perConnectionBufferLimitBytes() const override {\\n288:     return per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\\n289:   }\\n290:   std::chrono::milliseconds listenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\\n291:     return listener_filters_timeout_;\\n292:   }\\n293:   bool continueOnListenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\\n294:     return continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\\n295:   }\\n296:   Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override { return listener_factory_context_->listenerScope(); }\\n297:   uint64_t listenerTag() const override { return listener_tag_; }\\n298:   const std::string& name() const override { return name_; }\\n299:   Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef udpListenerConfig() override {\\n300:     return udp_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *udp_listener_config_\\n301:                                            : Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef();\\n302:   }\\n303:   Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef internalListenerConfig() override {\\n304:     return internal_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *internal_listener_config_\\n305:                                                 : Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef();\\n306:   }\\n307:   Network::ConnectionBalancer&\\n308:   connectionBalancer(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\\n309:     auto balancer = connection_balancers_.find(address.asString());\\n310:     ASSERT(balancer != connection_balancers_.end());\\n311:     return *balancer->second;\\n312:   }\\n313:   ResourceLimit& openConnections() override { return *open_connections_; manager when\\n474:   // listener initialization is complete.\\n475:   // Important: local_init_watcher_ must be the last field in the class to avoid unexpected\\n476:   // watcher callback during the destroy of ListenerImpl.\\n477:   Init::WatcherImpl local_init_watcher_;\\n478:   std::shared_ptr<Server::Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContextImpl>\\n479:       transport_factory_context_;\\n480: \\n481:   Quic::QuicStatNames& quic_stat_names_;\\n482:   MissingListenerConfigStats missing_listener_config_stats_;\\n483: \\n484:   // to access 0};\\n304:             }));\\n305:   }\\n306: \\n307:   void checkStats(int line_num, uint64_t added, uint64_t modified, uint64_t removed,\\n308:                   uint64_t warming, uint64_t active, server_.stats_store_.counter(\\\"listener_manager.listener_added\\\").value());\\n313:     EXPECT_EQ(modified, server_.stats_store_.counter(\\\"listener_manager.listener_modified\\\").value());\\n314:     EXPECT_EQ(removed, server_.stats_store_.counter(\\\"listener_manager.listener_removed\\\").value());\\n315:     EXPECT_EQ(warming, server_.stats_store_\\n316: Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\\n322:                           .value());\\n323:     EXPECT_EQ(draining, server_.stats_store_\\n324: std::string& expected_dump_yaml,\\n335:       const Matchers::StringMatcher& name_matcher = Matchers::UniversalStringMatcher()) {\\n336:     auto message_ptr =\\n337: envoy::admin::v3::ListenersConfigDump&>(*message_ptr);\\n340:     envoy::admin::v3::ListenersConfigDump expected_listeners_config_dump;\\n341:     TestUtility::loadFromYaml(expected_dump_yaml, expected_listeners_config_dump);\\n342:     EXPECT_EQ(expected_listeners_config_dump.DebugString(), listeners_config_dump.DebugString());\\n343:   }\\n344: \\n345:   bool addOrUpdateListener(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n346:                            const std::string& version_info = \\\"\\\", bool added_via_api = true) {\\n347:     // Automatically inject a matcher that always matches \\\"foo\\\" if not present.\\n348:     envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener;\\n349:     listener.MergeFrom(config);\\n350:     if (use_matcher_ && !listener.has_filter_chain_matcher()) {\\n351:       const std::string filter_chain_matcher = R\\\"EOF(\\n352:         matcher_tree:\\n353:           input:\\n354:             name: port\\n355: added_via_api);\\n375:     if (status_or_error.status().ok()) {\\n376:       return status_or_error.value();\\n377:     }\\n378:     throw EnvoyException(std::string(status_or_error.status().message()));\\n379:   }\\n380: \\n381:   void testListenerUpdateWithSocketOptionsChange(const std::string& origin,\\n382:                                                  const std::string& updated,\\n383:                                                  bool multiple_addresses = false) {\\n384:     InSequence s;\\n385: \\n386:     EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\\n387:     ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\\n388: \\n389:     auto socket = "{\"content\":\"1: #pragma once\\n2: \\n3: #include \\\"source/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl.h\\\"\\n4: #include \\\"source/server/listener_manager_factory.h\\\"\\n5: \\n6: namespace parent_(parent) {}\\n12: \\n13:   // Server::ListenerComponentFactory\\n14:   LdsApiPtr createLdsApi(const envoy::config::core::v3::ConfigSource& lds_config,\\n15:                          const xds::core::v3::ResourceLocator* lds_resources_locator) override {\\n16:     return std::make_unique<LdsApiImpl>(\\n17:         lds_config, lds_resources_locator, parent_.clusterManager(), parent_.initManager(),\\n18:         *parent_.stats().rootScope(), parent_.listenerManager(),\\n19:         parent_.messageValidationContext().dynamicValidationVisitor());\\n20:   }\\n21: filter_chain_factory_context, network_config_provider_manager_);\\n26:   }\\n27:   absl::StatusOr<Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList> createListenerFilterFactoryList(\\n28:       const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>& filters,\\n29:       Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context) override {\\n30:     return ProdListenerComponentFactory::createListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(\\n31:         filters, context, tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_);\\n32:   }\\n33: filters,\\n36:       Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context) override {\\n37:     return ProdListenerComponentFactory::createUdpListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(filters, context);\\n38:   }\\n39:   absl::StatusOr<Filter::QuicListenerFilterFactoriesList> createQuicListenerFilterFactoryList(\\n40:       const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>& filters,\\n41:       Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context) override {\\n42:     return ProdListenerComponentFactory::createQuicListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(\\n43:         filters, context, quic_listener_config_provider_manager_);\\n44:   }\\n45:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr>\\n46:   createListenSocket(Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr, Network::Socket::Type,\\n47:                      const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr&, ListenerComponentFactory::BindType,\\n48:                      const Network::SocketCreationOptions&, uint32_t) override {\\n49:     // Returned sockets are not currently used so we can return nothing here safely vs. a\\n50:     // validation mock.\\n51:     // TODO(mattklein123): The fact that this returns nullptr makes the production code more\\n52:     // convoluted than it needs to be. Fix this to return a mock in a follow up.\\n53:     return nullptr;\\n54:   }\\n55:   DrainManagerPtr createDrainManager(envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener::DrainType) override {\\n56:     return nullptr;\\n57:   }\\n58:   uint64_t nextListenerTag() override { return 0; }\\n59:   Filter::TcpListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl*\\n60:   getTcpListenerConfigProviderManager() override {\\n61:     return &tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_;\\n62:   }\\n63: \\n64: private:\\n65:   Filter::NetworkFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl network_config_provider_manager_;\\n66:   Filter::TcpListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_;\\n67:   Filter::QuicListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl quic_listener_config_provider_manager_;\\n68:   Instance& parent_;\\n69: };\\n70: \\n71: class ValidationListenerManagerFactoryImpl : public ListenerManagerFactory {\\n72: public:\\n73:   std::unique_ptr<ListenerManager>\\n74:   createListenerManager(Instance& server, std::unique_ptr<ListenerComponentFactory>&& factory,\\n75:                         WorkerFactory& worker_factory, bool enable_dispatcher_stats,\\n76:                         Quic::QuicStatNames& quic_stat_names) override {\\n77:     ASSERT(!factory);\\n78:     return std::make_unique<ListenerManagerImpl>(\\n79:         server, std::make_unique<ValidationListenerComponentFactory>(server), worker_factory,\\n80:         enable_dispatcher_stats, quic_stat_names);\\n81:   }\\n82:   std::string name() const override {\\n83:     return Config::ServerExtensionValues::get().VALIDATION_LISTENER;\\n84:   }\\n85:   ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr createEmptyConfigProto() override {\\n86:     return std::make_unique<envoy::config::listener::v3::ValidationListenerManager>();\\n87:   }\\n88: };\\n89: \\n90: DECLARE_FACTORY(ValidationListenerManagerFactoryImpl);\\n91: \\n92: } // namespace Server\\n93: } // namespace Envoy\\n94: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--v1.33.0@75cca99ee9fea5a6b699af6a2124ec7404fe5d13/-/blob/source/extensions/listener_managers/validation_listener_manager/validation_listener_manager.h\"}"

\\n193: void testMerge() {\\n194:   Api::ApiPtr api = Api::createApiForTest();\\n195:   const std::string overlay = R\\\"EOF(\\n196:         {\\n197:           admin: {\\n198:             \\\"address\\\": {\\n199:               \\\"socket_address\\\": {\\n200:                 \\\"address\\\": \\\"1.2.3.4\\\",\\n201:                 \\\"port_value\\\": 5678\\n202:               }\\n203:             }\\n204:           },\\n205:           static_resources: {\\n206:             clusters: [\\n207:               {\\n208:                 name: 'foo'\\n209:               }\\n210:             ]\\n211:           }\\n212:         })EOF\\\";\\n213:   OptionsImplBase options(Server::createTestOptionsImpl(\\\"envoyproxy_io_proxy.yaml\\\", overlay,\\n214:                                                         Network::Address::IpVersion::v6));\\n215:   envoy::config::bootstrap::v3::Bootstrap bootstrap;\\n216:   ASSERT_TRUE(Server::InstanceUtil::loadBootstrapConfig(\\n217:                   bootstrap, options, ProtobufMessage::getStrictValidationVisitor(), *api)\\n218:                   .ok());\\n219:   EXPECT_EQ(2, bootstrap.static_resources().clusters_size());\\n220: }\\n221: \\n222: uint32_t run(const std::string& directory) {\\n223:   uint32_t num_tested = 0;\\n224:   Api::ApiPtr api = Api::createApiForTest();\\n225:   for (const std::string& filename : TestUtility::listFiles(directory, false)) {\\n226: #ifndef ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC\\n227:     if (filename.find(\\\"http3\\\") != std::string::npos) {\\n228:       ENVOY_LOG_MISC(info, \\\"Skipping HTTP/3 config {}.\\\\n\\\", filename);\\n229:       num_tested++;\\n230:       continue;\\n231:     }\\n232: #endif\\n233: \\n234:     ENVOY_LOG_MISC(info, \\\"testing {}.\\\\n\\\", filename);\\n235:     if (std::find_if(unsuported_win32_configs.begin(), unsuported_win32_configs.end(),\\n236:                      [filename](const absl::string_view& s) {\\n237:                        return filename.find(std::string(s)) != std::string::npos;\\n238:                      }) == unsuported_win32_configs.end()) {\\n239:       OptionsImplBase options(\\n240:           Envoy::Server::createTestOptionsImpl(filename, \\\"\\\", Network::Address::IpVersion::v6));\\n241:       ConfigTest test1(options);\\n242:       envoy::config::bootstrap::v3::Bootstrap bootstrap;\\n243:       EXPECT_TRUE(Server::InstanceUtil::loadBootstrapConfig(\\n244:                       bootstrap, options, ProtobufMessage::getStrictValidationVisitor(), *api)\\n245:                       .ok());\\n246:       ENVOY_LOG_MISC(info, \\\"testing {} as yaml.\\\", filename);\\n247:       OptionsImplBase config = asConfigYaml(options, *api);\\n248:       ConfigTest test2(config);\\n249:     }\\n250:     num_tested++;\\n251:   }\\n252:   return num_tested;\\n253: }\\n254: } // namespace ConfigTest\\n255: } // namespace Envoy\\n256: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--v1.33.0@75cca99ee9fea5a6b699af6a2124ec7404fe5d13/-/blob/test/config_test/config_test.cc\"}"

Input
{
  "path": "source/docs/listener.md",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/envoy--v1.33.0"
}
Output
"{\"content\":\"1: # Listener implementation\\n2: \\n3: ## Socket handling\\n4: \\n5: Envoy uses the following procedure for creating sockets and assigning them to workers.\\n6: \\n7: 1. When a listener is created, a socket is pre-created for every worker on the main thread. This\\n8:    allows most errors to be caught early on in the listener creation process (e.g., bad socket\\n9:    option, unable to bind, etc.).\\n10:     * If using reuse_port, a unique socket is created for every worker.\\n11:     * If not using reuse_port, a unique socket is created for worker 0, and then that socket\\n12:       is duplicated for all other workers.\\n13: 2. In the case of a listener update in which the address/socket is to be shared (i.e., a named\\n14:    listener that has configuration settings changed but listens on the same address will share\\n15:    sockets with the draining listener), all sockets are duplicated regardless of whether using\\n16:    reuse_port or not. This keeps the logic equivalent, and also makes sure that when using\\n17:    reuse_port no TCP connections are dropped during the drain process (in the race condition between\\n18:    assigning a queue and closing the listening socket on the old listener).\\n19: 3. In the case of hot restart, all sockets are requested by worker index. If the old process has\\n20:    a match, the socket is duplicated and sent to the new process. Thus, hot restart and a listener\\n21:    update effectively share the same update process. This is so that no connections are dropped\\n22:    when using reuse_port.\\n23: 4. A consequence of every listener having dedicated sockets (whether duplicated or not) is that\\n24:    a listener can close() its sockets when removed without concern for other listeners.\\n25: \\n26: For more information, see `ListenSocketFactoryImpl` and its use within `ListenerImpl` and\\n27: `ListenerManagerImpl`.\\n28: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--v1.33.0@75cca99ee9fea5a6b699af6a2124ec7404fe5d13/-/blob/source/docs/listener.md\"}"

testing::ByMove;\\n49: using testing::InSequence;\\n50: using testing::Return;\\n51: using testing::ReturnRef;\\n52: using testing::Throw;\\n53: \\n54: // For internal listener test only.\\n55: SINGLETON_MANAGER_REGISTRATION(internal_listener_registry);\\n56: \\n57: class ListenerManagerImplWithDispatcherStatsTest : public ListenerManagerImplTest {\\n58: protected:\\n59:   ListenerManagerImplWithDispatcherStatsTest() { enable_dispatcher_stats_ = true; }\\n60: };\\n61: \\n62: class ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest : public ListenerManagerImplTest {\\n63: public:\\n64:   void SetUp() override {\\n65:     ListenerManagerImplTest::SetUp();\\n66:     ASSERT_NE(nullptr, server_.singletonManager().getTyped<Network::InternalListenerRegistry>(\\n67:                            \\\"internal_listener_registry_singleton\\\",\\n68:                            [registry = internal_registry_]() { return registry; }));\\n69:   }\\n70: \\n71:   /**\\n72:    * Create an IPv4 listener with a given name.\\n73:    */\\n74:   envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener createIPv4Listener(const std::string& name) {\\n75:     envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(R\\\"EOF(\\n76:       address:\\n77:         socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1111 }\\n78:       filter_chains:\\n79:       - filters: []\\n80:         name: foo\\n81:     )EOF\\\");\\n82:     listener.set_name(name);\\n83:     return listener;\\n84:   }\\n85: \\n86:   /**\\n87:    * Used by some tests below to validate that, if a given socket option is valid on this platform\\n88:    * and set in the Listener, it should result in a call to setsockopt() with the appropriate\\n89:    * values.\\n90:    */\\n91:   void testSocketOption(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& listener,\\n92:                         const envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::SocketState& expected_state,\\n93:                         const Network::SocketOptionName& expected_option, int expected_value,\\n94:                         uint32_t expected_num_options = 1,\\n95:                         ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type =\\n96:                             ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort) {\\n97:     if (expected_option.hasValue()) {\\n98:       expectCreateListenSocket(expected_state, expected_num_options, bind_type);\\n99:       expectSetsockopt(expected_option.level(), expected_option.option(), expected_value,\\n100:                        expected_num_options);\\n101:       addOrUpdateListener(listener);\\n102:       EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\\n103:     } else {\\n104:       EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(listener), EnvoyException,\\n105:                                 \\\"MockListenerComponentFactory: Setting socket options failed\\\");\\n106:       EXPECT_EQ(0U, manager_->listeners().size());\\n107:     }\\n108:   }\\n109: };\\n110: \\n111: class ListenerManagerImplForInPlaceFilterChainUpdateTest : public Event::SimulatedTimeSystem,\\n112:                                                            public ListenerManagerImplTest {\\n113: public:\\n114:   envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener createDefaultListener() {\\n115:     envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto;\\n116:     Protobuf::TextFormat::ParseFromString(R\\\"EOF(\\n117:     name: \\\"foo\\\"\\n118:     address: {\\n119:       socket_address: {\\n120:         address: \\\"127.0.0.1\\\"\\n121:         port_value: 1234\\n122:       }\\n123:     }\\n124:     filter_chains: {}\\n125:   )EOF\\\",\\n126:                                           &listener_proto);\\n127:     return listener_proto;\\n128:   }\\n129: \\n130:   void expectAddListener(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& listener_proto,\\n131:                          ListenerHandle*) {\\n132:     EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\\n133:     EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\\n134:     addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto);\\n135:     worker_->callAddCompletion();\\n136:     EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\\n137:     checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\\n138:   }\\n139: \\n140:   Network::MockListenSocket*\\n141:   expectUpdateToThenDrain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& new_listener_proto,\\n142:                           ListenerHandle* old_listener_handle,\\n143:                           OptRef<Network::MockListenSocket> socket,\\n144:                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type = default_bind_type) {\\n145:     Network::MockListenSocket* new_socket;\\n146:     if (socket.has_value()) {\\n147:       new_socket = new NiceMock<Network::MockListenSocket>();\\n148:       EXPECT_CALL(socket.value().get(), duplicate())\\n149:           .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(std::unique_ptr<Network::Socket>(new_socket))));\\n150:     } else {\\n151:       new_socket = listener_factory_.socket_.get();\\n152:       EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, bind_type, _, 0));\\n153:     }\\n154:     EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\\n155:     EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, stopListener(_, _, _));\\n156:     EXPECT_CALL(*old_listener_handle->drain_manager_, startDrainSequence(_));\\n157: \\n158:     EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(new_listener_proto));\\n159: \\n160:     EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, removeListener(_, _));\\n161:     old_listener_handle->drain_manager_->drain_sequence_completion_();\\n162: \\n163:     EXPECT_CALL(*old_listener_handle, onDestroy());\\n164:     worker_->callRemovalCompletion();\\n165:     return new_socket;\\n166:   }\\n167: \\n168:   void expectRemove(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& listener_proto,\\n169:                     ListenerHandle* listener_handle, Network::MockListenSocket& socket) {\\n170: \\n171:     EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, stopListener(_, _, _));\\n172:     EXPECT_CALL(socket, close());\\n173:     EXPECT_CALL(*listener_handle->drain_manager_, startDrainSequence(_));\\n174:     EXPECT_TRUE(manager_->removeListener(listener_proto.name()));\\n175: \\n176:     EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, removeListener(_, _));\\n177:     listener_handle->drain_manager_->drain_sequence_completion_();\\n178: \\n179:     EXPECT_CALL(*listener_handle, onDestroy());\\n180:     worker_->callRemovalCompletion();\\n181:   }\\n182: };\\n183: \\n184: class MockLdsApi : public LdsApi {\\n185: public:\\n186:   MOCK_METHOD(std::string, versionInfo, (), (const));\\n187: };\\n188: \\n189: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, EmptyFilter) {\\n190:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n191: address:\\n192:   socket_address:\\n193:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n194:     port_value: 1234\\n195: filter_chains:\\n196: - filters: []\\n197:   name: foo\\n198:   )EOF\\\";\\n199: \\n200:   EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\\n201:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\\n202:   addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\\n203:   EXPECT_EQ(&manager_->httpContext(), &server_.httpContext());\\n204:   EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\\n205:   EXPECT_EQ(std::chrono::milliseconds(15000),\\n206:             manager_->listeners().front().get().listenerFiltersTimeout());\\n207: }\\n208: \\n209: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, DefaultListenerPerConnectionBufferLimit) {\\n210:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n211: address:\\n212:   socket_address:\\n213:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n214:     port_value: 1234\\n215: filter_chains:\\n216: - filters: []\\n217:   name: foo\\n218:   )EOF\\\";\\n219: \\n220:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\\n221:   addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\\n222:   EXPECT_EQ(1024 * 1024U, manager_->listeners().back().get().perConnectionBufferLimitBytes());\\n223: }\\n224: \\n225: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, DuplicatePortNotAllowed) {\\n226:   const std::string yaml1 = R\\\"EOF(\\n227: name: foo\\n228: address:\\n229:   socket_address:\\n230:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n231:     port_value: 1234\\n232: filter_chains:\\n233: - filters: []\\n234:   name: foo\\n235:   )EOF\\\";\\n236: \\n237:   const std::string yaml2 = R\\\"EOF(\\n238: name: bar\\n239: address:\\n240:   socket_address:\\n241:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n242:     port_value: 1234\\n243: filter_chains:\\n244: - filters: []\\n245:   name: foo\\n246:   )EOF\\\";\\n247: \\n248:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\\n249:   addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml1));\\n250:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\\n251:       addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2)), EnvoyException,\\n252:       \\\"error adding listener: 'bar' has duplicate address '127.0.0.1:1234' as existing listener\\\");\\n253: }\\n254: \\n255: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, DuplicateNonIPAddressNotAllowed) {\\n256:   const std::string yaml1 = R\\\"EOF(\\n257: name: foo\\n258: address:\\n259:   pipe:\\n260:     path: /path\\n261: filter_chains:\\n262: - filters: []\\n263:   name: foo\\n264:   )EOF\\\";\\n265: \\n266:   const std::string yaml2 = R\\\"EOF(\\n267: name: bar\\n268: address:\\n269:   pipe:\\n270:     path: /path\\n271: filter_chains:\\n272: - filters: []\\n273:   name: foo\\n274:   )EOF\\\";\\n275: \\n276:   addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml1));\\n277:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\\n278:       addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2)), EnvoyException,\\n279:       \\\"error adding listener: 'bar' has duplicate address '/path' as existing listener\\\");\\n280: }\\n281: \\n282: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleAddressesDuplicatePortNotAllowed) {\\n283:   const std::string yaml1 = R\\\"EOF(\\n284: name: foo\\n285: address:\\n286:   socket_address:\\n287:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n288:     port_value: 1234\\n289: additional_addresses:\\n290: - address:\\n291:     socket_address:\\n292:       address: 127.0.0.1\\n293:       port_value: 1234\\n294: filter_chains:\\n295: - filters: []\\n296:   name: foo\\n297:   )EOF\\\";\\n298: \\n299:   const std::string yaml2 = R\\\"EOF(\\n300: name: bar\\n301: address:\\n302:   socket_address:\\n303:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n304:     port_value: 1234\\n305: additional_addresses:\\n306: - address:\\n307:     socket_address:\\n308:       address: 127.0.0.3\\n309:       port_value: 1234\\n310: filter_chains:\\n311: - filters: []\\n312:   name: foo\\n313:   )EOF\\\";\\n314: \\n315:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0)).Times(2);\\n316:   addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml1));\\n317:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2)), EnvoyException,\\n318:                             \\\"error adding listener: 'bar' has duplicate address \\\"\\n319:                             \\\"'127.0.0.1:1234,127.0.0.3:1234' as existing listener\\\");\\n320: }\\n321: \\n322: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest,\\n323:        MultipleAddressesDuplicatePortNotAllowedWithZeroPortAndNonBind) {\\n324:   const std::string yaml1 = R\\\"EOF(\\n325: name: foo\\n326: address:\\n327:   socket_address:\\n328:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n329:     port_value: 0\\n330: additional_addresses:\\n331: - address:\\n332:     socket_address:\\n333:       address: 127.0.0.2\\n334:       port_value: 0\\n335: bind_to_port: false\\n336: filter_chains:\\n337: - filters: []\\n338:   name: foo\\n339:   )EOF\\\";\\n340: \\n341:   const std::string yaml2 = R\\\"EOF(\\n342: name: bar\\n343: address:\\n344:   socket_address:\\n345:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n346:     port_value: 0\\n347: additional_addresses:\\n348: - address:\\n349:     socket_address:\\n350:       address: 127.0.0.3\\n351:       port_value: 0\\n352: bind_to_port: false\\n353: filter_chains:\\n354: - filters: []\\n355:   name: foo\\n356:                   \\\"error adding listener: 'bar' has duplicate address \\\"\\n361:                             \\\"'127.0.0.1:0,127.0.0.3:0' as existing listener\\\");\\n362: }\\n363: \\n364: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, AllowCreateListenerWithMutipleZeroPorts) {\\n365:   const std::string yaml1 = R\\\"EOF(\\n366: name: foo\\n367: address:\\n368:   socket_address:\\n369: filter_chains:\\n377: - filters: []\\n378:   name: foo\\n379:   )EOF\\\";\\n380: \\n381:   const std::string yaml2 = R\\\"EOF(\\n382: name: bar\\n383: address:\\n384:   socket_address:\\n385:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n386:     port_value: 0\\n387: additional_addresses:\\n388: - address:\\n389:     socket_address:\\n390:       address: 127.0.0.2\\n391:       port_value: 0\\n392: addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2));\\n401: }\\n402: \\n403: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, SetListenerPerConnectionBufferLimit) {\\n404:   const std::string yaml = per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 8192\\n413:   )EOF\\\";\\n414: \\n415:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\\n416: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TlsTransportSocket) {\\n421:   const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\\\"EOF(\\n422: address:\\n423:   socket_address:\\n424:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n425:     port_value: 1234\\n426: filter_chains:\\n427: - filters: []\\n428:   name: foo\\n429:   transport_socket:\\n430:     name: tls\\n431:     typed_config:\\n432:       \\\"@type\\\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\\n433:       common_tls_context:\\n434:         tls_certificates:\\n435:         - certificate_chain:\\n436:             filename: \\\"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\\\"\\n437:           private_key:\\n438:             filename: \\\"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\\\"\\n439:         validation_context:\\n440:           trusted_ca:\\n441:             filename: \\\"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\\\"\\n442:           match_subject_alt_names:\\n443:             exact: localhost\\n444:             exact: 127.0.0.1\\n445:   )EOF\\\",\\n446:                                                        Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\\n447: \\n448:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\\n449:   addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\\n450:   EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\\n451: \\n452:   auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \\\"127.0.0.1\\\", \\\"\\\", \\\"tls\\\", {}, \\\"8.8.8.8\\\", 111);\\n453:   ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\\n454:   EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\\n455: }\\n456: \\n457: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TransportSocketConnectTimeout) {\\n458:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n459: address:\\n460:   socket_address:\\n461:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n462:     port_value: 1234\\n463: filter_chains:\\n464: - filters: []\\n465:   name: foo\\n466:   transport_socket_connect_timeout: 3s\\n467:   )EOF\\\";\\n468: \\n469:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\\n470:   addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\\n471:   auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \\\"127.0.0.1\\\", \\\"\\\", \\\"\\\", {}, \\\"8.8.8.8\\\", 111);\\n472:   ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\\n473:   EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain->transportSocketConnectTimeout(), std::chrono::seconds(3));\\n474: }\\n475: \\n476: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, UdpAddress) {\\n477:   EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\\n478:   EXPECT_FALSE(manager_->isWorkerStarted());\\n479:   ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\\n480:   // Validate that there are no active listeners and workers are started.\\n481:   EXPECT_EQ(0, server_.stats_store_\\n482:                    .gauge(\\\"listener_manager.total_active_listeners\\\",\\n483:                           Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\\n484:                    .value());\\n485:   EXPECT_EQ(1, server_.stats_store_\\n486:                    .gauge(\\\"listener_manager.workers_started\\\", Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\\n487:                    .value());\\n488: \\n489:   const std::string proto_text = R\\\"EOF(\\n490:     address: {\\n491:       socket_address: {\\n492:         protocol: UDP\\n493:         address: \\\"127.0.0.1\\\"\\n494:         port_value: 1234\\n495:       }\\n496:     }\\n497:   )EOF\\\";\\n498:   envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto;\\n499:   EXPECT_TRUE(Protobuf::TextFormat::ParseFromString(proto_text, &listener_proto));\\n500: \\n501:   EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\\n502:   EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\\n503:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_,\\n504:               createListenSocket(_, Network::Socket::Type::Datagram, _,\\n505:                                  ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort, _, 0))\\n506:       .WillOnce(\\n507:           Invoke([this](const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&, Network::Socket::Type,\\n508:                         const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr&,\\n509:                         ListenerComponentFactory::BindType, const Network::SocketCreationOptions&,\\n510:                         uint32_t) { return listener_factory_.socket_; }));\\n511:   EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, setSocketOption(_, _, _, _)).Times(testing::AtLeast(1));\\n512:   EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, close(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(Api::SysCallIntResult{0, errno}));\\n513:   addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto);\\n514:   EXPECT_EQ(1u, manager_->listeners().size());\\n515: }\\n516: \\n517: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, AllowOnlyDefaultFilterChain) {\\n518:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n519: address:\\n520:   socket_address:\\n521:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n522: manager_->listeners().size());\\n529: }\\n530: \\n531: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, BadListenerConfig) {\\n532:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n533: address:\\n534:   socket_address:\\n535:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n536:     port_value: 1234\\n537: filter_chains:\\n538: - filters: []\\n539: test: a\\n540:   )EOF\\\";\\n541: \\n542:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\\n543:                           \\\"test\\\");\\n544: }\\n545: \\n546: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, BadListenerConfigNoFilterChains) {\\n547:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n548: address:\\n549:   socket_address:\\n550:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n551:     port_value: 1234\\n552:   )EOF\\\";\\n553: \\n554:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\\n555: socket_address:\\n562:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n563:     port_value: 1234\\n564: filter_chains:\\n565: - filters:\\n566:   - foo: type\\n567:     name: name\\n568:   name: foo\\n569:   )EOF\\\";\\n570: \\n571:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\\n572:                           \\\"foo\\\");\\n573: }\\n574: \\n575: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, BadConnectionLessUdpConfigWithFilterChain) {\\n576:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n577: address:\\n578:   socket_address:\\n579:     protocol: UDP\\n580:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n581:     port_value: 1234\\n582: filter_chains:\\n583: - filters: []\\n584:   name: foo\\n585:   )EOF\\\";\\n586: \\n587:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\\n588:                           \\\"1 filter chain\\\\\\\\(s\\\\\\\\) specified for connection-less UDP listener\\\");\\n589: }\\n590: \\n591: class NonTerminalFilterFactory : public Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory {\\n592: public:\\n593:   // Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory\\n594:   absl::StatusOr<Network::FilterFactoryCb>\\n595:   createFilterFactoryFromProto(const Protobuf::Message&,\\n596:                                Server::Configuration::FactoryContext&) override {\\n597:     return [](Network::FilterManager&) -> void {};\\n598:   }\\n599: \\n600:   ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr createEmptyConfigProto() override {\\n601:     return std::make_unique<\\n602:         test::extensions::listener_managers::listener_manager::NonTerminalFilter>();\\n603:   }\\n604: \\n605:   std::string name() const override { return \\\"non_terminal\\\"; }\\n606: };\\n607: \\n608: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TerminalNotLast) {\\n609:   NonTerminalFilterFactory filter;\\n610:   Registry::InjectFactory<Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory> registered(filter);\\n611: \\n612:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n613: address:\\n614:   socket_address:\\n615:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n616:     port_value: 1234\\n617: filter_chains:\\n618: - filters:\\n619:   - name: non_terminal\\n620:     typed_config:\\n621:       \\\"@type\\\": type.googleapis.com/test.extensions.listener_managers.listener_manager.NonTerminalFilter\\n622:   name: foo\\n623:   )EOF\\\";\\n624: \\n625:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(\\n626:       addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\\n627:       \\\"Error: non-terminal filter named non_terminal of type non_terminal is the last \\\"\\n628:       \\\"filter in a network filter chain.\\\");\\n629: }\\n630: \\n631: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, NotTerminalLast) {\\n632:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n633: address:\\n634:   socket_address:\\n635:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n636:     port_value: 1234\\n637: filter_chains:\\n638: - filters:\\n639:   - name: envoy.filters.network.tcp_proxy\\n640:     typed_config:\\n641:       \\\"@type\\\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.tcp_proxy.v3.TcpProxy\\n642:       stat_prefix: tcp\\n643:       cluster: cluster\\n644:   - name: unknown_but_will_not_be_processed\\n645:   name: foo\\n646:   )EOF\\\";\\n647: \\n648:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(\\n649:       addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\\n650:       \\\"Error: terminal filter named envoy.filters.network.tcp_proxy of type \\\"\\n651:       \\\"envoy.filters.network.tcp_proxy must be the last filter in a network filter chain.\\\");\\n652: }\\n653: \\n654: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, BadFilterName) {\\n655:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n656: address:\\n657:   socket_address:\\n658:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n659:     port_value: 1234\\n660: filter_chains:\\n661: - filters:\\n662:   - name: invalid\\n663:   name: foo\\n664:   )EOF\\\";\\n665: \\n666:   EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\\n667:       addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\\n668:       \\\"Didn't find a registered implementation for 'invalid' with type URL: ''\\\");\\n669: }\\n670: \\n671: class TestStatsConfigFactory : public Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory {\\n672: public:\\n673:   // Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory\\n674:   absl::StatusOr<Network::FilterFactoryCb> createFilterFactoryFromProto(\\n675:       const Protobuf::Message&,\\n676:       Configuration::FactoryContext& filter_chain_factory_context) override {\\n677:     return commonFilterFactory(filter_chain_factory_context);\\n678:   }\\n679: \\n680:   ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr createEmptyConfigProto() override {\\n681:     return std::make_unique<\\n682:         test::extensions::listener_managers::listener_manager::TestStatsFilter>();\\n683:   }\\n684: \\n685:   std::string name() const override { return \\\"stats_test\\\"; }\\n686: \\n687:   bool isTerminalFilterByProto(const Protobuf::Message&,\\n688:                                Server::Configuration::ServerFactoryContext&) override {\\n689:     return true;\\n690:   }\\n691: \\n692: private:\\n693:   Network::FilterFactoryCb commonFilterFactory(Configuration::FactoryContext& context) {\\n694:     context.scope().counterFromString(\\\"bar\\\").inc();\\n695:     return [](Network::FilterManager&) -> void {};\\n696:   }\\n697: };\\n698: \\n699: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, StatsScopeTest) {\\n700:   TestStatsConfigFactory filter;\\n701:   Registry::InjectFactory<Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory> registered(filter);\\n702: \\n703:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n704: address:\\n705:   socket_address:\\n706:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n707:     port_value: 1234\\n708: bind_to_port: false\\n709: filter_chains:\\n710: - filters:\\n711:   - name: stats_test\\n712:     typed_config:\\n713:       \\\"@type\\\": type.googleapis.com/test.extensions.listener_managers.listener_manager.TestStatsFilter\\n714:   name: foo\\n715:   )EOF\\\";\\n716: \\n717:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_,\\n718:               createListenSocket(_, _, _, ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind, _, 0));\\n719:   addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\\n720:   manager_->listeners().front().get().listenerScope().counterFromString(\\\"foo\\\").inc();\\n721: \\n722:   EXPECT_EQ(1UL, server_.stats_store_.counterFromString(\\\"bar\\\").value());\\n723:   EXPECT_EQ(1UL, server_.stats_store_.counterFromString(\\\"listener.127.0.0.1_1234.foo\\\").value());\\n724: }\\n725: \\n726: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, UsingAddressAsStatsPrefixForMultipleAddresses) {\\n727:   TestStatsConfigFactory filter;\\n728:   Registry::InjectFactory<Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory> registered(filter);\\n729: \\n730:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n731: address:\\n732:   socket_address:\\n733:     address: 127.0.0.1\\n734:     port_value: 1234\\n735: additional_addresses:\\n736: - address:\\n737: typed_config:\\n745:       \\\"@type\\\": type.googleapis.com/test.extensions.listener_managers.listener_manager.TestStatsFilter\\n746:   name: foo\\n747:   )EOF\\\";\\n748: \\n749:   EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_,\\n750:               createListenSocket(_, _, _, ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind, _, 0))\\n751:       .Times(2);\\n752:   addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\\n753:   manager_->listeners().front().get().listenerScope().counterFromString(\\\"foo\\\").inc();\\n754: \\n755:   EXPECT_EQ(1UL, server_.stats_store_.counterFromString(\\\"bar\\\").value());\\n756:   EXPECT_EQ(1UL, server_.stats_store_.counterFromString(\\\"listener.127.0.0.1_1234.foo\\\").value());\\n757: }\\n758: \\n759: TEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, MultipleSocketTypeSpecifiedInAddresses) {\\n760:   const std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n761:     name: \\\"foo\\\"\\n762:     address:\\n763:       socket_address:\\n764:         protocol: TCP\\n765:         address: \\\"::0\\\"\\n766:         port_value: 13332\\n767:     additional_addresses:\\n768:     - address:\\n769:         socket_address:\\n770:           protocol: TCP\\n771:           address: \\\"::0\\\"\\n772:           port_value: 13333\\n773:     - address:\\n774:         socket_address:\\n775:           protocol: The filter factory list is created from\n * statically registered filters.\n */\nclass ProdListenerComponentFactory : public ListenerComponentFactory,\n                                     Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\npublic:\n  ProdListenerComponentFactory(Instance& server) : server_(server) {}\n  /**\n   * Static worker for createNetworkFilterFactoryList() that can be used directly in tests.\n   */\n  static absl::StatusOr<Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList> createNetworkFilterFactoryListImpl(\n      const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::Filter>& filters,\n      Configuration::FilterChainFactoryContext& filter_chain_factory_context,\n      Filter::NetworkFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl& config_provider_manager);\n\n  /**\n   * Static worker for createListenerFilterFactoryList() that can be used directly in tests.\n   */\n  static absl::StatusOr<Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList> createListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(\n      const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>& filters,\n      Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context,\n      Filter::TcpListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl& config_provider_manager);\n\n  /**\n   * Static worker for createUdpListenerFilterFactoryList() that can be used directly in tests.\n   */\n  static filters,\n      Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context);\n\n  /**\n   * Static worker for createQuicListenerFilterFactoryList() that can be used directly in tests.\n   */\n  static absl::StatusOr<Filter::QuicListenerFilterFactoriesList>\n  createQuicListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(\n      const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>& filters,\n createListenerFilterMatcher(const envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter& listener_filter);\n\n  // Server::ListenerComponentFactory\n  LdsApiPtr createLdsApi(const envoy::config::core::v3::ConfigSource& lds_config,\n                         const xds::core::v3::ResourceLocator* lds_resources_locator) override {\n    return std::make_unique<LdsApiImpl>(\n        lds_config, lds_resources_locator, server_.clusterManager(), server_.initManager(),\n        *server_.stats().rootScope(), server_.listenerManager(),\n        server_.messageValidationContext().dynamicValidationVisitor());\n  }\n  absl::StatusOr<Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList> createNetworkFilterFactoryList(\n      const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::Filter>& filters,\n      Server::Configuration::FilterChainFactoryContext& filter_chain_factory_context) override {\n    return createNetworkFilterFactoryListImpl(filters, filter_chain_factory_context,\n                                              network_config_provider_manager_);\n  }\n tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_);\n  }\n  absl::StatusOr<std::vector<Network::UdpListenerFilterFactoryCb>>\n  createUdpListenerFilterFactoryList(\n      const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>& filters,\n      Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context) override {\n    return const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t worker_index) override;\n\n  DrainManagerPtr\n  createDrainManager(envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener::DrainType drain_type) override;\n  uint64_t nextListenerTag() override { return next_listener_tag_++; }\n  Filter::TcpListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl*\n  getTcpListenerConfigProviderManager() override {\n    return &tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_;\n  }\n\nprivate:\n  Instance& server_;\n  uint64_t next_listener_tag_{1};\n  Filter::NetworkFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl network_config_provider_manager_;\n ListenerImpl;\nusing ListenerImplPtr = std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>;\n\n/**\n * All listener manager stats. @see stats_macros.h\n */\n#define ALL_LISTENER_MANAGER_STATS(COUNTER, GAUGE)                                                 \\\n  COUNTER(listener_added)                                                                          \\\n  COUNTER(listener_create_failure)                                                                 \\\n  COUNTER(listener_create_success)                                                                 \\\n  COUNTER(listener_in_place_updated) NeverImport)                                                 \\\n  GAUGE(total_listeners_active, NeverImport)                                                       \\\n
